title: Umea Heavy Rain
lead: Umea is experiencing heavy rain with a Z-Score of -3.26, indicating a significant anomaly. The score of 10.0/10 and CRITICAL level indicate extreme conditions.
body:
The heavy rain in Umea is causing widespread disruptions, with 94% humidity and 10.8 km/h winds exacerbating the situation. 
 The HDD of 12.4 GG and CDD of 0.0 GG suggest a significant impact on heating and energy consumption. 
 The city's infrastructure and daily life are being severely affected by the heavy rain, with potential long-term consequences.
conclusion: Implement emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Umea.
